fix_decisions.claim_text: annotations sub-fetch failure vs sibling recovery asymmetry
fix_decisions.evidence: real design question worth a follow-up (either abort the fallback on a failed sub-fetch or document the asymmetry as deliberate + pin it); changing the behavior now would expand a converged loop's scope on a pre-existing arm — recorded for the human reviewer
